user.title: DMI Weather Hybrid
user.description:
Set up your DMI Weather Hybrid integration. Current values come from DMI station observations, and forecasts come from the DMI forecast model.

Latitude and longitude are pre-filled from your Home Assistant system location — change them if you want forecasts for a different location.

Station ID is required. Find valid DMI station IDs here: {docs_url}

Update interval is in minutes (minimum 5, default 30).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to DMI API

init.title: DMI Weather Hybrid options
init.description:
Update the station ID used for current observations and the polling interval.

Find valid DMI station IDs here: {docs_url}

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to DMI API
